name: NIMH Data Archive (NDA)
description: An NIH informatics platform that shares de-identified human-subjects data — harmonized to common standards — from hundreds of mental-health and neurodevelopment projects. It hosts major collections including ABCD, the Connectome Coordination Facility, and many autism and psychiatric studies, providing access (via Data Use Certification) to large-scale social, behavioral, and imaging data.
citation: National Institute of Mental Health Data Archive (NDA). National Institutes of Health. https://nda.nih.gov/
